name: Udaijin
description: The Minister of the Right is a seahorse merman in service to King Neptune. While it is not clear exactly what his job entails, he appears to have some administrative and military duties. He also appears to be partially guard or commander as he and other guards hurried towards the princess when in need of help. His actual name is unknown.  First Appearance: Chapter 612  (source: One Piece Wikia)
